```
MODE NOT SUPPORTED H:74,16 V:66.1
```

I have LCD 17 inch monitor and geforce 4 graphic card.

I played game few days ago but yesterday my xserver (xorg X) crashed (unknown reason)
and i reinstalled it.Now i can`t play savage. Help ?

### Post by Cappy on 2008-06-20
Try moving your .savage folder and see if that helps
```
mv ~/.savage ~/.savagebak
```
